params.name: Cut-in-two
params.description: As night falls, faint whispers can be heard from deep within the Valley, murmuring, "We apologize for failing to entertain you, dear players..." Until one day, a half-bodied figure slowly emerged—a solemn tribute to the "strongest" and his unfortunate fate.
